title: engine
text: engine Specify the storage engine to use. USYS$MQL_PARAMS = engine : EngineName Arguments EngineName —storage engine can be one of the following: myisam innodb bdb merge memory ndbcluster default Description Use the engine option to specify which storage engine to use. If set to default , or if not specified, this option defaults to the one specified at the installation of the MySQL Server. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
